videos.title: DeepSeek sparks global AI selloff, Nvidia sinks 17% | REUTERS
videos.text: the S&P 500 in the NASDAQ ended lower on Monday as Nvidia and other chip makers sold off after surging popularity of a lowcost Chinese artificial intelligence model raised investor worries about the outlooks for current AI leaders in the United States Chinese startup deep seek rolled out a free assistant it says uses cheaper chips and less data raising questions about investor expectations that AI will drive demand and along a supply chain from Chip makers to Data Centers Nvidia plunged about 177% shaving nearly $600 billion off its Market valuation while an index of semiconductor stocks had its biggest single day percentage decline since March 2020 but the Dow actually Rose about 2/3 of 1% while the s&p500 dropped about 1 12% and the NASDAQ fell 3% despite the big moves in the red for some stocks Zach's investment research client portfolio manager Brian Mulberry sees encouraging signs well in the market today you know we're seeing it across kind of the the different indices a very different experience NASDAQ down sharply the S&P kind of in the middle and the Dow turning slightly positive if I pivot that and talk about just growth and value growth down sharply but value is actually up over a percent on the day in particular large cap value what does that mean in investors are coming back to I think a little bit more common sense valuations but also very strong very healthy balance sheets other stocks on the Move included AT&T which jumped 6% to a 3 and 1 halfe high after its fourth quarter Wireless subscriber growth surpassed expectations and shares of Ralph Lauren slipped 3% after brokerage Raymond James cut its rating to Market perform citing the huge rally in the stock which surged 60% last year and has gained another 11% so far in

maybe the past decade that being said you know the the very recent event on Christmas day uh you know about a month ago uh deep seek released a model uh which by the way I think it's symbolic that the Chinese lab releases you know an earth shattering model on Christmas Day when you know the rest of us are sort of celebrating holiday and um and they released it to to much ffer and then they followed up with their reasoning model uh deep R1 which is the one that we evaluated as top of the leader board um you know the the there the reality is yes and no so uh you know the Chinese Labs uh they have reasoning uh but the anthropic models make a really good at code and sort of there's a there's a diversity of uh of capabilities of the models that being said I think what we're seeing in general is and uh that's just my take and we'll see how the stock market does tomorrow and uh that's it for me data Finance 365 subscribe to this channel stay tuned peace

videos.title: Deepseek vs Chatgpt triggers selloff in Nvidia | China's Data Dominance #deepseek #chatgpt #china
videos.text: Today and over the last couple of days I have been reading about China and some of the companies in China. One particular is coming up with a faster method of AI and a much less expensive method. Mr. Trump is also saying that China has done wonders. The chatbot DeepSeek has been created using 6 million dollars and two employees. The same chatbot GPT had spent billions of dollars and thousands of employees in making it. DeepSeek has prepared a better and an advanced version using the old NV's GPU. Due to this, there was selling in all the tax stocks and there was a market collapse of 2 trillion dollars, due to which you can see that NV's share has also fallen to 1617 in a single day, which is the biggest single day fall in NV's history till date. What do you all think, which one is better between GPT and DeepSeek, please do let us know by commenting.
